title: Microcoelia elliotii
taxonomy: Microcoelia elliotii is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of parasitic orchid, specifically a mycoheterotroph, which obtains its nutrients by parasitizing fungi associated with its host plant. The genus Microcoelia is part of the subtribe Angraecinae. The classification of Microcoelia elliotii is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Angiospermophyta. At the species level, Microcoelia elliotii is considered a distinct species within the orchid family.
uses: Microcoelia elliotii has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including antioxidant and antimicrobial activities.
